title: Self-approved vendor master change by MV-U05: Ratio Consulting GmbH (209101)
explanation: MV-U05 changed AND approved master data for account 209101 (Ratio Consulting GmbH, field: Neuanlage Kreditor) on 12.05.2025 - violation of the four-eyes principle required for vendor master changes (JET workpaper, control 3). MV-U05 additionally holds rights: Buchen, Zahlungslauf, Stammdaten/Kreditor anlegen - a toxic SoD combination, and has no 'Journal freigeben' approval right per permissions report. Cash-out to this vendor: 5 invoices totalling 295.120,00 EUR, all paid (avg 2.0 days after invoice) with 0 goods receipts / delivery evidence on file.

title: Unrecorded liabilities: 8 next-period vendor invoices for 2025 services, no 2025 accrual - 192.000,00 EUR
explanation: Invoices in Fakturajournal_Januar_2026_Kreditoren are dated Jan 2026 but carry LEISTUNGSDATUM in Dec 2025 (e.g. 'Frachten Dez 2025'). The vendors have no 2025 bookings in the AP subledger, i.e. no accrual/liability was recognized in FY2025. Expenses understated, profit overstated by ~192.000,00 EUR (JET criterion K4).

title: Repair-typical cost capitalized as asset: Generalüberholung Stanzautomat (040000-000194), 41.000,00 EUR
explanation: Asset addition 'Generalüberholung Stanzautomat' on 26.11.2025 (doc ER901424) has a repair/maintenance-typical description. Repairs are period expense, not capitalizable - profit overstated (JET criterion K3).

title: 4 payments to Castor Papier GmbH within 0 day(s), each just under the 10.000 EUR approval limit (total 39.040,00 EUR)
explanation: Payment approvals are required from 10.000 EUR (JET workpaper, control 3). Vendor 200007 received 4 separate payments in the 9.000-9.999 EUR band within 0 day(s) - combined 39.040,00 EUR, i.e. a single obligation split to stay below the second-approval threshold (JET criterion K5): 14.10.2025 9780,00 'Teilzahlung Lieferantenrechnung'; 14.10.2025 9820,00 'Teilzahlung Lieferantenrechnung'; 14.10.2025 9750,00 'Teilzahlung Lieferantenrechnung'; 14.10.2025 9690,00 'Teilzahlung Lieferantenrechnung'

title: 8 new vendors have NO creation entry in the master-data change log
explanation: Vendor creations require approval (JET workpaper, control 3) and are recorded as 'Neuanlage Kreditor' in Stammdatenaenderungen_2025.csv. These vendors have no opening balance (not pre-existing) and no creation record - the documented creation control was bypassed: 209130 Nord Transport GmbH (Musterort); 209131 Delta Energie GmbH (Musterort); 209132 Atlas Werkstoffe GmbH (Musterort); 209133 Vega Technik GmbH (Musterort); 209134 Orion Logistik GmbH (Musterort); 209135 Kronos Druck GmbH (Musterort); 209136 Prisma Chemie GmbH (Musterort); 209137 Helios Systeme GmbH (Musterort)

title: Saldenliste_2024_Vorjahr.xlsx is empty (headers only) while IT attestation claims completeness
explanation: The prior-year trial balance contains no data rows, so opening balances (Journal AB-2024) cannot be verified against any prior-year source - yet IT-Bestaetigung_Vollstaendigkeit_2025.pdf attests completeness of the export. Contradiction between provided evidence documents.

title: Large single asset addition: Produktionslinie Verpackung X500 480.000,00 EUR (doc ER901435)
explanation: Single asset addition 'Produktionslinie Verpackung X500' (040000-000197) of 480.000,00 EUR on 17.06.2025, doc ER901435, booked via AP vendor 200003. No goods receipt on file for this document. Above 50% of overall materiality - verify existence and capitalization basis (invoice, Investitionsantrag).

title: Bank details changed for Delta Logistik SE (200075) on 14.09.2025; 4 payments totalling 328.403,11 EUR afterwards
explanation: Bank-account changes are a classic payment-redirection vector. Change was approved by MV-U02; verify the new IBAN against an independent vendor confirmation before relying on it.

title: 8 missing document number(s) in ER range ER900000-ER901446
explanation: Missing: ER901427, ER901428, ER901429, ER901430, ER901431, ER901432, ER901433, ER901434. Gaps in a continuous invoice sequence can indicate deleted or suppressed documents.

title: Invoice AR502040 (22.015,00 EUR) booked in subledger/GL but absent from Fakturajournal and goods-issue list
explanation: Customer 100100 invoice exists only in the accounting records, not in the billing journal or logistics evidence. Could be a booking outside the invoicing process - or an innocent correction; review the full reversal chain before concluding.

title: 300 vendor invoices with material-like text but no goods receipt
explanation: Of 589 AP bookings without goods receipt, most are services (freight, rent, consulting). These 300 have material-like booking texts yet no Wareneingang - verify delivery evidence (JET criterion K2): ER900070 Eingangsrechnung Werbe- und Reisekost; ER900071 Eingangsrechnung Bezugsnebenkosten; ER900075 Eingangsrechnung Bezugsnebenkosten; ER900076 Eingangsrechnung Konzernumlage / Verw; ER900077 Eingangsrechnung Fuhrpark; ER900083 Eingangsrechnung Bezugsnebenkosten ...

title: Near-duplicate vendors in Hannover: 209110 Nord Logistik GmbH / 209111 Nordlicht Logistik GmbH
explanation: Vendors with nearly identical names registered in the same city - classic double-payment or phantom-vendor setup. 2 of the two have AP activity. Verify they are distinct legal entities (different VAT IDs on file: DE459514202 vs DE743864625).

title: Posting-time profile: 29% of entries on weekends, 0% at night (22:00-06:00)
explanation: Baseline computed from the full GL. Time-based flags are raised only for patterns occurring in <5% of postings, so routine behaviour of this specific company is not misreported as anomalous.
